stage: 6 — ERC-8004 identity + audit trail + validator reputation
redeployedAt: 2026-07-12 (fresh registries so the audited decision record is in English)

notes.ipfsPinning: AgentCard is NOT pinned to public IPFS (no credentials). The CID is genuine and content-addressed — see docs/agent-card.cid.txt.
notes.specDeviations: IdentityRegistry omits the EIP-712-signed setAgentWallet (agent wallet == owner). ValidationRegistry uses a constructor instead of initialize (no proxy).
notes.supersedes: First Stage 6 deploy (Identity 0x5a33…4D36, Validation 0xb7f7…2dE4) whose audited decision record was in Polish; those registries are abandoned.
